name: Piercing Thrust

names.th-th: แทงทะลุ

description: Thrust your sword deeply forward, dealing {0}% physical damage to enemies in range.

name: Shield Charge

names.th-th: พุ่งชนด้วยโล่

description: Raise your shield and charge forward. Deal {0}% physical damage to enemies you collide with.

name: Retribution Strike

names.th-th: การลงทัณฑ์

description: Strike enemies multiple times, dealing {0}% physical damage per hit. The lower the hero's HP, the more strikes.

name: Aegis Field

names.th-th: สนามอีจิส

description: Deploy a protective aura that blocks {0} damage for allies within the area.

name: Sacred Blade

names.ja-jp: セイクリッドブレード
names.th-th: ดาบศักดิ์สิทธิ์

description: Imbue your sword with holy power. While buffed, attack damage increases by 50% and attacks restore {0} HP.

name: Unyielding Will

names.th-th: เจตจำนงไม่สั่นคลอน

description: Once per stage, when near-death, focus your mind to rise again with {0}% HP.

name: Rapid Fire

names.th-th: ยิงเร็ว

description: Fire multiple arrows in succession, dealing {0}% physical damage per arrow.

name: Scatter Shot

names.th-th: ยิงกระจาย

description: Fire multiple homing arrows. Deal {0}% physical damage per arrow.

name: Arrow Rain

names.th-th: ฝนธนู

description: Fire multiple arrows into the sky, dealing {0}% physical damage to enemies in a wide area.

name: Swift Surge

names.th-th: พลังความรวดเร็ว

description: Temporarily accelerate your metabolism. Attack speed increases by {0}% for the duration.

name: Piercing Arrow

names.th-th: ลูกศรเจาะทะลุ

description: Fire a piercing arrow that deals {0}% physical damage to enemies hit.

name: Skewer Shot

names.th-th: ยิงเสียบ

description: Fire a deep-wounding arrow. Damage increases by {0}% per lodged arrow; 3+ arrows cause bleeding.

name: Fireball

names.th-th: ลูกไฟ

description: A fireball that explodes on impact, dealing {0}% AoE fire damage.

name: Ice Orb

names.th-th: ลูกน้ำแข็ง

description: Summon an ice orb and hurl it at enemies. Slows enemies hit and deals {0}% multi-hit cold damage.

name: Lightning

names.th-th: สายฟ้า

description: Unleash electricity forward, dealing {0}% lightning damage to enemies.

name: Flame Hydra

names.th-th: ไฮดราเพลิง

description: Summon a hydra that fires fireballs dealing {0}% damage.

name: Snowstorm

names.th-th: พายุหิมะ

description: Summon a mass of ice shards raining on enemies. Deals {0}% cold damage per second and chills enemies in the area.

name: Meteor Strike

names.th-th: อุกกาบาต

description: Summon a meteor, dealing {0}% damage to enemies in a wide area.

name: Heal

names.th-th: รักษา

description: Restore one ally's HP by an amount equal to {0}% of their maximum HP.

name: Blessing Of Might

names.th-th: พรแห่งพลัง

description: A blessing active while equipped. Increases attack damage of self and nearby party members by {0}%.

name: Wrath of Heaven

names.th-th: พิโรธแห่งสวรรค์

description: Imbue your scepter with divine lightning. For the duration, attacks deal {0}% lightning area damage.

name: Sanctuary

names.th-th: สถานศักดิ์สิทธิ์

description: Deploy a holy sanctuary across the battlefield. For the duration, all allies inside regenerate {0} HP per second.

name: Blessing of Warding

names.th-th: พรแห่งการปกป้อง

description: A blessing active while equipped. Increases elemental resistance of self and nearby party members by {0}.

name: Resurrection

names.th-th: คืนชีพ

description: Revive a fallen party member with {0}% of their max HP.

name: Explosive Bolt

names.ja-jp: エクスプロージョンボルト
names.th-th: สลักระเบิด

description: Fire a crossbow bolt that explodes on impact, dealing {0}% area fire damage.

name: Frost Bolt

names.th-th: สลักน้ำแข็ง

description: Fire a crossbow bolt that explodes on impact, dealing {0}% area cold damage and freezing enemies hit.

name: Quick Loader

names.th-th: บรรจุกระสุนเร็ว

description: Rapidly reload crossbow bolts. Attack speed increases by 50% for {0} attacks.

name: Charge Trap

names.th-th: กับดักชาร์จ

description: Launch {0} traps that explode when struck by elemental damage.

name: Crossbow Turret

names.th-th: ป้อมธนูหน้าไม้

description: Deploy an automated crossbow that fires bolts dealing {0}% physical damage.

name: Shock Bolt

names.th-th: สลักช็อก

description: Fire a crossbow bolt that lodges in an enemy and emits lightning for a time. The bolt releases currents dealing {0}% lightning damage to nearby enemies.

name: Slam Jump

names.th-th: กระโดดทุบ

description: Gather strength and smash an enemy for {0}% physical damage. If it kills the enemy, a shockwave deals 350% damage to nearby enemies.

name: Crushing Blow

names.th-th: ทุบบด

description: Gather strength and smash an enemy for {0}% physical damage. If it kills the enemy, a shockwave deals 350% damage to nearby enemies.

name: Commander’s Cry

names.th-th: เสียงกองทัพ

description: Let out a cry that stuns nearby enemies and increases party critical chance multiplier by {0}%.

name: Ground Slam

names.th-th: ทุบพื้น

description: Smash the ground hard, causing an earthquake that deals {0}% physical damage to enemies. Rocks created by the earthquake explode when hit by AoE physical attacks.

name: Axe Spin

names.th-th: หมุนขวาน

description: Spin with an axe, dealing {0}% physical damage per second to nearby enemies and a chance to apply bleeding. Attacks against bleeding enemies deal bonus damage.

name: Bloodlust

names.th-th: กระหายเลือด

description: Consume half of current HP to increase attack damage by {0}% for a time.
